orchestration-plane/orchestration-routin:
- id: routing-langgraph-conditional-edges
    labels:
      zh: LangGraph 条件路由
      en: LangGraph conditional routing
      ja: LangGraph 条件ルーティング
    descriptions:
      zh: LangGraph StateGraph 中使用 add_conditional_edges("classifier", route_by_severity, {"high": "security_review", "low": "general_support"})：route_by_severity 读取 state["severity"]，severity="high" 时流转 security_review 节点。
      en: LangGraph StateGraph uses add_conditional_edges("classifier", route_by_severity, {"high": "security_review", "low": "general_support"}) where route_by_severity reads state["severity"] and routes to security_review when severity="high".
      ja: LangGraph StateGraph で add_conditional_edges("classifier", route_by_severity, {"high": "security_review", "low": "general_support"}) を使い severity="high" で security_review へ遷移。
    field_values: {source: LangGraph, api: add_conditional_edges, router: route_by_severity}
    related_node_ids: [RoutingDecision, BranchCondition, Route]
    source_claims: [claim-orchestration-routing-control-module]
    synthetic: false
  - id: routing-semantic-router-layer
    labels:
      zh: Semantic Router 语义路由
      en: Semantic Router semantic routing
      ja: Semantic Router セマンティックルーティング
    descriptions:
      zh: aurelio-labs/semantic-router 中 Route(name="billing", utterances=["I want a refund", "check my bill"]) 与 Route(name="tech", utterances=["app crashed"]) 组成 SemanticRouter(encoder=OpenAIEncoder, routes=routes)；用户输入经嵌入 cosine similarity 选最高分 Route。
      en: In aurelio-labs/semantic-router, Route(name="billing", utterances=["I want a refund"]) and Route(name="tech", utterances=["app crashed"]) form SemanticRouter(encoder=OpenAIEncoder, routes=routes) matching input via embedding cosine similarity.
      ja: semantic-router で Route(name="billing") と Route(name="tech") を SemanticRouter に渡し embedding cosine similarity で最適 Route を選択。
    field_values: {source: semantic-router, api: SemanticRouter, method: cosine similarity}
    related_node_ids: [RoutingPolicy, RoutingCondition, Route]
    source_claims: [claim-orchestration-routing-control-module]
    synthetic: false
  - id: routing-openai-agents-handoff
    labels:
      zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 交接路由
      en: OpenAI Agents SDK handoff routing
      ja: OpenAI Agents SDK ハンドオフルーティング
    descriptions:
      zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 中 triage_agent = Agent(name="Triage", handoffs=[billing_agent, technical_agent])；Runner.run(triage_agent, "I need a refund") 产生 HandoffOutputItem(source_agent=triage, target_agent=billing)。
      en: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent = Agent(name="Triage", handoffs=[billing_agent, technical_agent]); Runner.run(triage_agent, "I need a refund") yields HandoffOutputItem(source_agent=triage, target_agent=billing).
      ja: triage_agent の handoffs=[billing_agent, technical_agent] で Runner.run が HandoffOutputItem を生成。
    field_values: {source: OpenAI Agents SDK, api: handoffs, method: model-driven selection}
    related_node_ids: [RoutingDecision, SuccessorDispatch, RoutingTarget]
    source_claims: [claim-orchestration-routing-control-module]
    synthetic: false
  - id: routing-opa-gate-retry
    labels:
      zh: OPA 门控与 LangGraph 重试
      en: OPA gate with LangGraph retry routing
      ja: OPA ゲートと LangGraph リトライ
    descriptions:
      zh: Open Policy Agent bundle policy/support/allow.rego 对 input.ticket.risk 求值；LangGraph retry_router 在 state["attempts"]<3 时返回 "retry" 否则 END，与 GateOutcome block 组合控制 SuccessorDispatch。
      en: OPA bundle policy/support/allow.rego evaluates input.ticket.risk; LangGraph retry_router returns "retry" when state["attempts"]<3 else END, combined with GateOutcome block for SuccessorDispatch control.
      ja: OPA allow.rego が risk を評価し LangGraph retry_router が attempts<3 で retry、否则 END を返す。
    field_values: {source: OPA, api: rego eval, retry: retry_router}
    related_node_ids: [Gate, GateOutcome, RetryPolicy, SuccessorDispatch]
    source_claims: [claim-orchestration-routing-control-boundary]
    synthetic: false
